mandate: Fix 3 production bugs discovered by Hana: nav-button focus desync, anchor stability error, verify interactivity

tasks.title: Fix renderNavBar nav-next focus detection (inverted logic)
tasks.bug: isNavNextFocused checks last focus elem (nav-cancel) instead of finding nav-next by ID. When user tabs to nav-cancel, it highlights as Next. When user tabs to nav-next, no highlight.
tasks.fix: Replace position-based check with direct ID check: focusedElem.id === 'nav-next'

tasks.title: Add cancel button focus styling
tasks.bug: Cancel button is always secondaryButton() — never gets focusedButton() when focused via Tab
tasks.fix: Add isNavCancelFocused check and apply focusedButton() style when focused

tasks.title: Add nav-back focus styling
tasks.bug: Back button never gets focus styling either

tasks.title: Harden anchor stability timeout and fallback
tasks.bug: 1500ms timeout with 3 stable samples too aggressive for large prompts. Graceful fallback requires ALL anchors to be valid.
tasks.fix: Increased timeout to 3000ms, reduced stable samples to 2, added bestAnchorsState fallback, added prompt-only fallback

tasks.title: Add diagnostic logging to anchor detection
tasks.bug: When anchor detection fails, no diagnostic info about what WAS detected vs what was missing
tasks.fix: Log lastState details on timeout: promptBottom, inputBottom, stableKey, pollCount

tasks.title: Unit tests for nav focus styling
tasks.bug: No test coverage for nav button focus detection logic

tasks.title: Unit tests for anchor stability fallback
tasks.bug: Existing tests may not cover the promptOnly fallback or increased timeout

tasks.title: Build verification + full test suite
tasks.fix: make build passes, new tests all pass (9/9), no regressions in existing tests

tasks.title: Rule of Two Pass 1
tasks.fix: Subagent review PASS — 2 minor nits resolved

tasks.title: Fix binary E2E test timeouts
tasks.bug: TestBinaryE2E_FullFlowToExecution, TestBinaryE2E_VerifyPTYLive, TestBinaryE2E_PlanEditorFlow, TestBinaryE2E_CancelDuringVerify all timeout at ~157s — 8 Tabs overshoots nav-next landing on nav-cancel which opens cancel dialog
tasks.fix: Created focusNavNext() helper using Shift+Tab×2 from index 0 — works regardless of element count. All 4 tests now pass in ~60s each.

tasks.title: Verify screen Shell button implementation
tasks.bug: Shell button is placeholder TODO — investigate feasibility

tasks.title: Fix staticcheck SA4032 dead code in module_capture_test.go
tasks.bug: 6 runtime.GOOS=="windows" skip guards are dead code — file has //go:build unix constraint
tasks.fix: Removed all 6 dead skip guards + unused runtime import

tasks.title: Fix ResolveConflictsWithClaudePreExistingFailure test timeout
tasks.bug: Mock data missing 'reason' field required by T097 validation, causing 3 retries → 60s timeout. No delay zeroing.
tasks.fix: Added reason field to mock data + zeroed SEND_TEXT_NEWLINE_DELAY_MS, SEND_TEXT_CHUNK_DELAY_MS, _RESOLVE_BACKOFF_BASE_MS

tasks.title: Fix SuperDocument TUI→shell transition after non-blocking tea.run()
tasks.bug: Commit 8f901df7 made tea.run() non-blocking but the tui command handler's finally block runs BEFORE BubbleTea exits, so _userRequestedShell is always false → tui.requestExit() is always called → REPL exits instead of showing (super-document) prompt
tasks.fix: Added __postBubbleTeaExit callback mechanism: JS registers callback before tea.run(), Go executes it after WaitForProgram() returns. Both engine_core.go and tui_manager.go paths covered.
